stories.title: Cursor 3.3 - PR Review, Parallel Builds, and Quick Actions
stories.summary: New PR review experience with inline threads and commit history view, ability to execute plans in parallel using async subagents, and quick-action pills for splitting changes into PRs and pinning skills.

stories.title: Realtime 2 with Reasoning and Translation Features
stories.summary: Released Realtime 2, a new realtime voice model with configurable reasoning for speech-to-speech agents. Also launched Realtime Translate for streaming speech translation and Realtime Whisper for streaming speech-to-text.

stories.title: Enterprise Model Controls and Spend Management Updates
stories.summary: New PR review experience with inline threads and commit history view, ability to execute plans in parallel using async subagents, and quick-action pills for splitting changes into PRs and pinning skills.
